title: dysoxylum decandrum
intro: Dysoxylum decandrum, also known as the Himalayan Birch or East Indian Birch, is a species of tree in the family Meliaceae, native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dysoxylum decandrum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory and digestive issues. The herbal preparations of the plant include making teas, infusions, and decoctions from its bark, leaves, and roots, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
